# RFCs

## Why this file exists

This directory holds the project's RFCs (Requests For Comments).
Use one when a design decision is contested, cross-cutting, or
load-bearing for the bounded context. Accepted RFCs should
update `DECISION_LOG.md` and (when behavior changes) `SPEC.md`.

| TODO — replace with first RFC row | TODO | TODO |

## Template

Use `0001-template.md` as a starting point. Copy it, give the
file a number-prefixed name (`0002-foo-bar.md`), and replace
the placeholders.

The optional `## Domain Modeling` section identifies which DDD
pattern the new concept fits (aggregate root, value object,
domain event, or boundary clarification) and cites the
appropriate `DDD.md § "Adding to the model"` step.
